experiment: Does chromatin accessibility predict off-target activity? (v6.10.2 cross-cell + v6.10.3 cell-type-matched)
hypothesis: Lazzarotto et al. 2020 (CHANGE-seq, 10.1038/s41587-020-0555-7): CELL-BASED off-target activity is enriched in open chromatin; IN-VITRO (cell-free) activity is not (no chromatin in vitro).
method: Off-target protospacers mapped to hg38 (GRCh38.fa) by exact match on both strands (grep -F). AUROC of accessibility for active-vs-inactive off-targets per assay; 500x bootstrap 95% CI; in-vitro assays as NEGATIVE control. Phase 1 (v6.10.2): Stage B K562 ATAC/DNase (CROSS-CELL proxy), 1 kb bins. Phase 2 (v6.10.3): CELL-TYPE-MATCHED ENCODE HEK293T DNase-seq (ENCFF529BOG) queried at each off-target's 1 kb bin (pyBigWig mean) — HEK293T matches GUIDE-seq (HEK293) and TTISS (HEK293T).

phase2_hek293t_matched.track: ENCODE HEK293T DNase-seq (ENCFF529BOG, read-depth normalized signal, GRCh38)

verdict: VALIDATED (moderate, cell-type-matched) for WT-Cas9 cell-based off-target activity.
interpretation: Cell-type-MATCHED accessibility (HEK293T DNase) predicts WT-Cas9 cell-based off-target activity: GUIDE-seq AUROC rises 0.58 (cross-cell K562 proxy) -> 0.671 (matched, CI [0.642, 0.701]), confirming the cross-cell proxy was dampening the real effect (Lazzarotto 2020). The in-vitro negative control stays null (0.494) -> the method has no spurious signal. The effect is MODERATE (accessibility alone is one factor; the sequence/CRISOT score dominates) and CELL-TYPE-SPECIFIC (the cross-cell proxy underperforms). It does NOT transfer to TTISS (0.383 even matched) — but TTISS is a Cas9-VARIANT specificity assay (engineered high-fidelity variants), whose off-target landscape is driven by variant fidelity, not WT chromatin sensitivity, so it is the expected outlier.
decision: Chromatin is now a VALIDATED (moderate, cell-type-matched) qualitative modifier, surfaced as an annotation with the direction + evidence. It still does NOT silently change the numeric off-target risk score — a calibrated CRISOT+accessibility combination (incremental-over-sequence value) is the remaining refinement and is not yet built. The deployed app abstains (no raw track mounted).
remaining_refinement: quantify the INCREMENTAL value of accessibility ON TOP OF the CRISOT sequence score (AUPRC of CRISOT+accessibility vs CRISOT alone) before letting it re-rank; deferred.
